## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test

## Scientific / Agent Impact

- [ ] Does not send raw matrices or raw coordinate arrays to the LLM
- [ ] Keeps tool outputs traceable
- [ ] Preserves warnings/errors in user-facing outputs
- [ ] Frames biological interpretation cautiously

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `scripts/check_project.sh`
- [ ] Streamlit smoke check, if UI changed
- [ ] Report/output bundle checked, if analysis behavior changed
